steps.title: Identify what supporting evidence requires
steps.content: To support Browner's claim, the answer needs concrete evidence from the notes showing Ballard's compositions actually incorporate Native musical elements—not just restate the claim.

steps.title: Apply the evidence standard
steps.content: Choice B provides concrete supporting evidence: Washington Festival Suite incorporates a Pueblo log drum, proof that the composition relies on traditional Native musical elements. The use of “affirms” makes explicit that this example supports Browner's claim. The other three lack such evidence or are factually inaccurate. That matches choice B — B is correct.
